title: Roosters, Beer and Live Music
summary:
Ruhstaller farm was another Harvest Host find right outside of Davis. It is a big farm filled with ducks, sheep, chickens, cats and more while also being a tap house and live music venue. I have never seen anything quite like it, it felt reminiscent to being in another country. We spent the afternoon drinking beer in the sun and watching the general chaos around us as kids played in the water, roosters cock-a-doodle-dooed and the dogs said hi to everyone. The space soon filled up as more and more families and college students rolled in and the live band played. Harvest Host has been very fun because it brings us to places we would otherwise never have heard of and each one is unique. It's also nice to be able to eat and drink and then walk a few hundred yards to your house in the parking lot.

-Helen

photos.caption: Colin enjoying a beer at the farm
The path leading into Ruhstaller Farm
